title: Realistic gunpowder mining
description: Changes the metnod of mining gunpowder.
body:
This mod makes gunpowder mining more realistic, gunpowder no longer falls out of creepers. Now gunpowder has crafting, a new ore has been added: Sulfur, and a new item is Potassium nitrate.

You can get potassium nitrate by grinding creeper flesh (this is a new creeper drop) in a crusher (The crusher will help you with this modification by crushing items), and then pass the contaminated potassium nitrate through a sieve. 

![Production of potassium nitrate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f4813f2ba354b7b087009186652c188d4e93472_0.webp)

Sulfur ore is found only in the meadow biome from 75 to 155 meters high But you can buy sulfur from a wandering trader.

![Sulfure ore in cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29615adb511897f65c4f045c11589983d9398cb8_0.webp)
![Wandering trader sells sulfur ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aef59bd3fac82ef28da3311cab86f185c56fcd3_0.webp)

Added a TNT activator that changes TNT crafting, it can be crafted using items from the mod and redstone.

![New craft of TNT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4858dd0e92822513976f3d8d26cd9b0efb6d2376.png)
